channel.title: All Registered Polls for the European Parliament
channel.description: All Registered Polls for the European Parliament

item.title: Opinion Poll by Mediana for POP, 22–24 June 2026 – Seat Projections for the Parties
item.description:
• Demokrati (EPP): 0 seats
  • Nova Slovenija–Krščanski demokrati (EPP): 0–1 seats
  • Slovenska nacionalna stranka (PfE): 0 seats
  • Prerod – Stranka Vladimirja Prebiliča (Greens/EFA): 0 seats
  • Gibanje Svoboda (RE): 3–4 seats
  • Slovenska demokratska stranka (NI): 0–1 seats
  • Levica (GUE/NGL): 0–1 seats
  • Piratska stranka Slovenije (Greens/EFA): 0 seats
  • Resni.ca (NI): 0 seats
  • Slovenska demokratska stranka (EPP): 2–4 seats
  • VESNA–Zelena stranka (Greens/EFA): 0 seats
  • Socialni demokrati (S&D): 1 seats
  • Slovenska ljudska stranka (EPP): 0 seats
  • FOKUS – za Slovenijo s ciljem (*): 0 seats

item.title: Opinion Poll by Mediana for POP, 22–24 June 2026 – Seat Projections for a Selection of Coalitions
Opinion Poll by Mediana for POP, 22–24 June 2026 – Voting Intentions
item.description:
• Demokrati (EPP): 2.3–5.3%
  • Nova Slovenija–Krščanski demokrati (EPP): 4.8–8.9%
  • Slovenska nacionalna stranka (PfE): 1.1–3.4%
  • Prerod – Stranka Vladimirja Prebiliča (Greens/EFA): 1.4–4.0%
  • Gibanje Svoboda (RE): 24.1–31.4%
  • Slovenska demokratska stranka (NI): 4.7–8.7%
  • Levica (GUE/NGL): 3.8–7.5%
  • Piratska stranka Slovenije (Greens/EFA): 2.0–4.9%
  • Resni.ca (NI): 2.5–5.7%
  • Slovenska demokratska stranka (EPP): 18.9–25.6%
  • VESNA–Zelena stranka (Greens/EFA): 1.7–4.5%
  • Socialni demokrati (S&D): 7.7–12.6%
  • Slovenska ljudska stranka (EPP): 1.4–4.0%
  • FOKUS – za Slovenijo s ciljem (*): 0.6–2.5%

• Demokrati (EPP): 0 seats

  • VESNA–Zelena stranka (Greens/EFA): 0 seats
  • Socialni demokrati (S&D): 0–1 seats

item.title: Opinion Poll by IJEK for Utrip Družbe, 8–19 June 2026 – Seat Projections for a Selection of Coalitions
Opinion Poll by IJEK for Utrip Družbe, 8–19 June 2026 – Voting Intentions
item.description:
• Demokrati (EPP): 3.1–6.7%
  • Nova Slovenija–Krščanski demokrati (EPP): 5.1–9.5%
  • Slovenska nacionalna stranka (PfE): 1.0–3.4%
  • Prerod – Stranka Vladimirja Prebiliča (Greens/EFA): 1.8–4.7%
  • Gibanje Svoboda (RE): 20.9–28.1%
  • Slovenska demokratska stranka (NI): 4.2–8.2%
  • Levica (GUE/NGL): 4.5–8.6%
  • Piratska stranka Slovenije (Greens/EFA): 1.4–4.1%
  • Resni.ca (NI): 4.7–8.8%
  • Slovenska demokratska stranka (EPP): 17.3–24.1%
  • VESNA–Zelena stranka (Greens/EFA): 2.1–5.2%
  • Socialni demokrati (S&D): 6.9–11.7%
  • Slovenska ljudska stranka (EPP): 1.5–4.3%
  • FOKUS – za Slovenijo s ciljem (*): 0.6–2.6%

item.title: Opinion Poll by Ninamedia for Dnevnik, 8–10 June 2026 – Seat Projections for the Parties
item.description:
• Demokrati (EPP): 0 seats
  • Nova Slovenija–Krščanski demokrati (EPP): 0–1 seats

  • Slovenska demokratska stranka (NI): 0–1 seats
  • Levica (GUE/NGL): 0–1 seats

item.title: Opinion Poll by Ninamedia for Dnevnik, 8–10 June 2026 – Seat Projections for a Selection of Coalitions
Opinion Poll by Ninamedia for Dnevnik, 8–10 June 2026 – Voting Intentions
item.description:
• Demokrati (EPP): 2.9–6.1%
  • Nova Slovenija–Krščanski demokrati (EPP): 6.8–11.2%
  • Resni.ca (NI): 2.7–5.7%
  • Slovenska demokratska stranka (EPP): 18.8–25.3%
  • VESNA–Zelena stranka (Greens/EFA): 1.8–4.4%
  • Socialni demokrati (S&D): 7.1–11.6%
  • Gibanje Svoboda (RE): 23.3–30.1%
  • Slovenska demokratska stranka (NI): 4.8–8.6%
  • Levica (GUE/NGL): 4.0–7.5%

item.title: Opinion Poll by Valicon for Siol, 8–12 May 2026 – Seat Projections for a Selection of Coalitions
Opinion Poll by Valicon for Siol, 8–12 May 2026 – Voting Intentions
item.description:
• Demokrati (EPP): 3.6–5.9%
  • Nova Slovenija–Krščanski demokrati (EPP): 4.6–7.0%
  • Slovenska nacionalna stranka (PfE): 2.0–3.8%
  • Prerod – Stranka Vladimirja Prebiliča (Greens/EFA): 2.4–4.3%
  • Gibanje Svoboda (RE): 23.1–27.7%
  • Mi, socialisti! (*): 0.8–2.1%
  • Glas upokojencev (*): 0.5–1.5%
  • Slovenska demokratska stranka (NI): 4.6–7.0%
  • Levica (GUE/NGL): 3.1–5.2%
  • Piratska stranka Slovenije (Greens/EFA): 3.8–6.1%
  • Resni.ca (NI): 6.3–9.1%
  • Slovenska demokratska stranka (EPP): 17.4–21.5%
  • VESNA–Zelena stranka (Greens/EFA): 1.5–3.0%
  • Socialni demokrati (S&D): 6.5–9.3%
  • Slovenska ljudska stranka (EPP): 1.5–3.0%
  • FOKUS – za Slovenijo s ciljem (*): 0.7–1.8%
